name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle catch-up on what came through the practice yesterday. A few new patients reached out, some appointments got booked, and the day moved along nicely — nothing that needs your attention before coffee.

We'll keep things running smoothly today too. If anything pops up that needs a human touch, you'll be the first to know.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
